how_it_works.title: Describe Your Store
how_it_works.description: Tell us what you're selling — AI will create the structure, design, and copy for the store.

how_it_works.title: Add Products and Configure Payment
how_it_works.description: Upload products, set prices, and connect a convenient payment system.

how_it_works.title: Launch and Sell
how_it_works.description: Publish the store — promote on social media and search and receive orders.

faq.question: How long does it take to create an online store?
faq.answer: Basic version with catalog and payment — from 5 to 30 minutes depending on the number of products.

faq.question: Are technical skills required to create a store?
faq.answer: No. The entire process is code-free: describe the store, configure through the editor, and publish.

faq.question: How do I add many products quickly?
faq.answer: Upload an Excel spreadsheet with products — Promto imports them into the catalog automatically.

faq.question: Can I migrate an existing store to Promto?
faq.answer: Yes, we help import products and data from popular platforms.

faq.question: How do I promote the store in search?
faq.answer: SEO optimization is built-in: meta tags, structured data, and fast page loading.

faq.question: How much does it cost to create and maintain a store?
faq.answer: Free to start. Advanced features and custom domain on affordable paid plans.

cta_mid_subtitle: No code, no programmers — your store will be operational today.
